title: Make hex-intf/CLAUDE.md conform to hex refresh marker protocol
rationale: hex-intf is the source repo AND a hex project — it must dogfood its own tooling. The current CLAUDE.md lacks the <!-- hex:claude-md:start/end --> markers that `hex refresh` requires, causing refresh to bail with a yellow warning. Fix is to (a) reconcile the shipped template (`hex-cli/assets/templates/claude-md-hex-section.md`) with hex-intf's richer managed-section content so the template is authoritative, (b) insert markers into hex-intf/CLAUDE.md around the sections that map to the template (Behavioral Rules / Autonomous Operation, hex Tool Precedence, Hexagonal Architecture Rules), leaving hex-specific sections (System Components, crate layout, Standalone Mode, Tiered Inference Routing, HexFlo internals, etc.) OUTSIDE the markers as project-authoritative content. After this, `hex refresh` round-trips cleanly.

tasks.title: Audit delta between hex-intf/CLAUDE.md managed sections and the shipped template
tasks.acceptance: Produce docs/analysis/claude-md-conform-delta.md listing every wording divergence between hex-intf/CLAUDE.md sections (Behavioral Rules > Autonomous Operation, Tool Precedence, Hexagonal Architecture Rules) and hex-cli/assets/templates/claude-md-hex-section.md. Flag which divergences should win (hex-intf is canonical unless the template has an improvement).

tasks.title: Update shipped template to match hex-intf canonical wording
tasks.acceptance: hex-cli/assets/templates/claude-md-hex-section.md is updated so the Autonomous Behavior rules, Tool Precedence table, and Hexagonal Architecture Rules match hex-intf/CLAUDE.md verbatim (except where the delta doc marks the template wording as intentionally preferred). `cargo build -p hex-cli` succeeds.

tasks.title: Insert marker-wrapped block into hex-intf/CLAUDE.md
tasks.acceptance: CLAUDE.md at the repo root contains a single <!-- hex:claude-md:start --> ... <!-- hex:claude-md:end --> block whose content is byte-identical to the shipped template. The block is placed at the natural point in the file (between the intro prose and System Components). hex-intf-specific sections remain outside the markers. `hex refresh` now reports `✓ CLAUDE.md already up-to-date` instead of the yellow-○ skip.

tasks.title: Add refresh round-trip check to hex ci
tasks.acceptance: `hex ci` (or equivalent doctor check) verifies that running `hex refresh --dry-run` on hex-intf produces no diff — i.e., the marker-wrapped section matches the shipped template. Prevents drift where someone edits one without the other.

tasks.title: Rebuild hex-cli release binary
tasks.acceptance: cargo build -p hex-cli --release succeeds; `hex refresh` prints `✓` for CLAUDE.md when run in hex-intf.
